title: elymus macrourus
intro: Elymus macrourus, also known as the long-spike wheat-grass, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its tall stalks and distinctive spikelets. The medicinal properties of Elymus macrourus have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory function, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Elymus macrourus can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in dried form for topical applications, making it a versatile addition to natural health regimens.
